    C

    cancel() - Method in class model.DeliveryRequest
    Cancels the request.
    cancel() - Method in class model.Mission
    Cancels the mission and makes the drone available again.

    CANCELLED - Enum constant in enum class model.enums.RequestStatus

    canDoMission(Route) - Method in class model.Drone
    Checks whether this drone has enough autonomy and battery to complete the given route.
    clear() - Method in class model.DelaunayTriangulation
     
    closeStats() - Method in class ui.MapCanvas
     
    CollectionCenter - Class in model
    Represents a medical collection center where organs are prepared.
    CollectionCenter(String, String, Position, List) - Constructor for class model.CollectionCenter
    Creates a collection center.
    complete() - Method in class model.Mission
    Completes the mission: sets status to DELIVERED.
    COMPLETED - Enum constant in enum class model.enums.RequestStatus
     
    compute(List) - Method in class model.DelaunayTriangulation
    Computes a simplified Delaunay triangulation.
    compute(List) - Method in class model.VoronoiDiagram
    Computes a simplified Voronoi diagram.
    computeDensity() - Method in class model.VoronoiCell
    Computes the density of this cell as user points per surface unit.
    computeDistance() - Method in class model.Route
    Computes the total route distance in canvas units.
    computeSurface() - Method in class model.Triangle
     
    computeSurface() - Method in class model.VoronoiCell
     
    computeSurface(double) - Method in class model.VoronoiCell
     
    confirmReception(MedicalStaff) - Method in class model.Mission
    Confirms that the organ has been received by a medical staff member.
    contains(Position) - Method in class model.VoronoiCell
    Checks whether a position belongs to this Voronoi cell.
    containsInCircumcircle(MedicalSite) - Method in class model.Triangle
    Checks if a medical site is inside the circumcircle of this triangle.
    containsSite(MedicalSite) - Method in class model.Triangle

    Creates a delivery request.

    Creates a complete mission from a delivery request.
